items.title: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) Announces To Increase Dividend, Effective Q4 2025
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is among the 11 Best Military Drone Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. The company recently announced that increase its regular annual cash dividend, effective from the fourth quarter of 2025. In a press release dated September 26, the firm said its Board of Directors had approved to raise the […]

items.title: Burner Management System Market Size to Hit USD 9.35 Billion by 2033 Owing to the Surging Emphasis on Industrial Safety | SNS Insider
items.author: Sns Insider
items.description: The Burner Management System Market is projected to grow from USD 5.67 Billion in 2025 to USD 9.35 Billion by 2033, driven by increasing industrial safety regulations, energy efficiency demands, and technological advancements in sectors like oil & gas, power generation, and chemicals.
